data.en: It's been raining.
data.hint: 使用 has been + -ing 表示最近持续的活动。
accept: It has been raining.

data.en: Have you been running?
data.hint: 疑问句：Have + 主语 + been + -ing?

data.en: Paul has been working hard.
data.hint: 单三主语使用 has been + -ing。
accept: Paul's been working hard.

data.en: What have you been doing?
data.hint: 疑问词 + have + 主语 + been + -ing?

data.en: I've been talking to Amanda.
data.cn: 我一直在和阿曼达谈话。
data.hint: I have 缩写为 I've。
accept: I have been talking to Amanda.

data.en: I've been looking for you.
data.hint: look for 表示“寻找”。
accept: I have been looking for you.

data.en: How long have you been learning English?
data.hint: How long 引导现在完成进行时询问时长。

data.en: Ben has been watching TV all day.
data.hint: all day 表示“整天”。
accept: Ben's been watching TV all day.

data.en: Chris hasn't been feeling well recently.
data.cn: 克里斯最近感觉不太舒服。
data.hint: 否定句：has not been + -ing。
accept: Chris has not been feeling well recently.

data.en: Silvia has been playing since she was eight.
data.cn: 西尔维娅从八岁起就一直在玩（打球）。
data.hint: since + 时间点，表示从过去某个时刻开始。
accept: Silvia's been playing since she was eight.

data.en: They've been going there for years.
data.cn: 他们去那里已经很多年了。
data.hint: for + 时间段，表示持续了多久。
accept: They have been going there for years.

data.en: I've been working hard.
data.hint: 表示最近刚结束或持续到现在的活动。
accept: I have been working hard.

data.en: We've been waiting for an hour.
data.cn: 我们已经等了一个小时了。
data.hint: wait for 等候。
accept: We have been waiting for an hour.

data.en: It's been raining for two hours.
data.cn: 雨已经下了两个小时了。
data.hint: has been raining 强调动作的持续。
accept: It has been raining for two hours.

data.en: I've been looking for you for the last half hour.
data.cn: 在过去的半小时里我一直在找你。
data.hint: for the last... 表示在过去的一段时间里。
accept: I have been looking for you for the last half hour.

data.en: How long has it been raining?
data.hint: How long 提问动作持续的时间。

data.en: They meet in the same cafe every morning.
data.cn: 他们每天早上在同一家咖啡馆见面。
data.hint: 一般现在时表示习惯。

data.en: It's been raining since two o'clock.
data.cn: 从两点钟起就一直在下雨。
data.hint: since 后面跟具体的时间点。
accept: It has been raining since two o'clock.

data.en: Where have you been?
data.hint: 现在完成时询问去向。

data.en: Hurry up! We're waiting.
data.hint: We are waiting 是现在进行时，表示现在的动作。
accept: Hurry up! We are waiting.

data.en: She's been watching TV.
data.hint: 根据情景推断刚才持续的动作。
accept: She has been watching TV.

data.en: They've been playing tennis.
data.hint: 动作刚刚停止，地面或人还留有痕迹。
accept: They have been playing tennis.

data.en: He's been running.
data.hint: 他气喘吁吁，因为他刚才一直在跑步。
accept: He has been running.

data.en: Have you been swimming?
data.hint: 根据对方湿漉漉的头发询问。

data.en: Have you been waiting long?
data.hint: 询问对方等待的时长。

data.en: What have you been doing?
data.cn: （看你弄得这么脏）你刚才一直在做什么？
data.hint: 询问导致当前状态的活动。

data.en: How long have you been working here?
data.hint: 询问在某地工作的时长。

data.en: How long have you been doing that?
data.hint: 询问某项活动的持续时间。

data.en: I'm sorry I'm late.
data.hint: 道歉的常用表达。
accept: I am sorry I am late.

data.en: We've been waiting for the bus for 20 minutes.
data.cn: 我们等公共汽车已经20分钟了。
data.hint: for + 时间段。
accept: We have been waiting for the bus for 20 minutes.

data.en: I've been learning Japanese since December.
data.cn: 从十二月起我一直在学习日语。
data.hint: since + 具体月份。
accept: I have been learning Japanese since December.

data.en: Jessica has been working in a hotel since 18 January.
data.cn: 杰西卡从1月18日起就在一家酒店工作。
data.hint: since + 具体日期。
accept: Jessica's been working in a hotel since 18 January.

data.en: Our friends have been going to Italy for years.
data.cn: 我们的朋友去意大利已经很多年了。
data.hint: for years 表示很多年了。

data.en: Maria has been learning English for two years.
data.hint: for + 两年的时间段。
accept: Maria's been learning English for two years.

data.en: Hi, Tom. I've been looking for you.
data.hint: 见面时说明刚才一直在做的动作。
accept: Hi, Tom. I have been looking for you.

data.en: Why have you been looking at me like that?
data.hint: 询问对方刚才到现在的奇怪行为。

data.en: Rachel has been teaching for ten years.
data.hint: 表示职业生涯的持续。
accept: Rachel's been teaching for ten years.

data.en: I've been thinking about what you said.
data.cn: 我一直在思考你所说的话。
data.hint: think about 思考。
accept: I have been thinking about what you said.

data.en: I've decided to take your advice.
data.cn: 我已决定采纳你的建议。
data.hint: 现在完成时表示过去决定的结果。
accept: I have decided to take your advice.

data.en: Sarah has been working very hard recently.
data.cn: 莎拉最近工作非常努力。
data.hint: recently 常与现在完成进行时连用。
accept: Sarah's been working very hard recently.

data.en: Laura has been travelling in South America for the last three months.
data.cn: 劳拉在过去的三个月里一直在南美洲旅行。
data.hint: 强调旅行的持续性。
accept: Laura's been travelling in South America for the last three months.

data.en: It's been raining all day.
data.hint: all day 引导的时间状语。
accept: It has been raining all day.

data.en: They have been meeting in the same cafe for years.
data.cn: 多年来他们一直在同一家咖啡馆见面。
data.hint: 强调重复性活动的长期性。
accept: They've been meeting in the same cafe for years.

data.en: Silvia has been playing tennis since she was a child.
data.cn: 西尔维娅从小就开始打网球了。
data.hint: since + 从句。
accept: Silvia's been playing tennis since she was a child.

data.en: What have you been doing recently?
data.hint: 询问近况。

data.en: I have been looking for my keys for ten minutes.
data.cn: 我已经找我的钥匙找了十分钟了。
data.hint: 强调找钥匙的持续时间。
accept: I've been looking for my keys for ten minutes.

data.en: Have you been waiting for me?
data.hint: wait for me 等我。

data.en: The ground is wet because it's been raining.
data.cn: 地面是湿的，因为一直在下雨。
data.hint: 因为刚才持续的动作导致现在的状态。
accept: The ground is wet because it has been raining.

data.en: How long has Ben been watching TV?
data.hint: 询问他人的活动时长。

data.en: I've been waiting for the bus since nine o'clock.
data.cn: 我从九点钟起就一直在等公车。
data.hint: since + 九点钟。
accept: I have been waiting for the bus since nine o'clock.
